events.name: South Carolina Gamecocks at UCLA Bruins

notes.headline: NCAA Women's Basketball Championship - National Championship

highlights.headline: UCLA routs South Carolina for first NCAA title
highlights.description: UCLA takes home the national title after a huge win over South Carolina.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCW Highlight (UCLA routs South Carolina for first national title) 2026/04/05 ESHEET

events.name: Illinois State Redbirds at Marshall Thundering Herd
South Carolina Gamecocks at UConn Huskies

notes.headline: NCAA Women's Basketball Championship - Final Four

headlines.description: — Ta'Niya Latson scored 16 and Agot Makeer added 14 points and South Carolina played stifling defense to beat UConn 62-48 on Friday night, ending the Huskies' 54-game winning streak and advancing to the women's NCAA Tournament championship game.
headlines.shortLinkText: South Carolina smothers UConn 62-48 to advance to NCAA title game, snaps Huskies’ 54-game win streak

events.name: Texas Longhorns at UCLA Bruins

notes.headline: NCAA Women's Basketball Championship - Final Four

headlines.description: — Lauren Betts had 16 points and made a huge block late, and UCLA withstood a late charge by Texas on Friday night for a 51-44 win to reach the women's NCAA Tournament national championship game for the first time.
headlines.shortLinkText: UCLA withstands Texas' late charge, reaches first national championship game with grinding 51-44 win

Michigan Wolverines at Texas Longhorns

notes.headline: NCAA Women's Basketball Championship - Regional 3 in Fort Worth - Elite 8

headlines.description: — Madison Booker had 19 points and seven rebounds, fifth-year senior guard Rori Harmon has 13 assists and Texas is going to the women’s Final Four for the second year in a row after a 77-41 rout over Michigan in the Fort Worth Regional 3 championship...
headlines.shortLinkText: Eyes of Texas on women's Final Four again after Longhorns beat Michigan in regional final

notes.headline: NCAA Women's Basketball Championship - Regional 4 in Sacramento - Elite 8

tracking.trackingName: NCW_One-Play (TCU Horned Frogs vs. South Carolina Gamecocks: Game Highlights) 2026/03/31 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Joyce Edwards scored 24 points and Agot Makeer added 18 to help South Carolina beat TCU 78-52 on Monday night to advance to the Final Four in the women's NCAA Tournament.
headlines.shortLinkText: Edwards, Makeer power South Carolina past TCU 78-52 to reach the Final Four
